markers.title: Command Post Alpha
markers.description: Primary forward command post. Capacity: 12 troopers. Status: ACTIVE.

markers.title: Armory Depot 7
markers.description: Main equipment storage. Restricted access — officer clearance required.

markers.title: Extraction Zone Bravo
markers.description: Emergency extraction point. Coordinates: 7-7-Alpha. Keep clear at all times.

markers.title: Hostile Contact Zone
markers.description: Last known hostile position. Classified threat level: HIGH.

markers.title: Training Ground Gamma
markers.description: Live-fire exercise zone. Authorized personnel only during scheduled hours.

markers.title: Forward Operating Base
markers.description: Temporary FOB established during Sector VII campaign. Resupply every 72 hours.

markers.title: Separatist Stronghold
markers.description: Confirmed Separatist droid fortification. Ground assault requires CC-level authorization.
